member.name: T:RequestType
member.summary: Enum for the request types.

member.name: T:RequestType_2
T:RequestType_3
member.summary: Transfer tokens among accounts.

member.name: T:RequestType_4
member.summary: Update an account.

member.name: T:RequestType_5
member.summary: Delete an account.

member.name: T:RequestType_6
member.summary: Add a livehash to an account

member.name: T:RequestType_7
member.summary: Delete a livehash from an account

member.name: T:RequestType_8
member.summary: Execute a smart contract call.

member.name: T:RequestType_9
member.summary: Create a smart contract.

member.name: T:RequestType_10
member.summary: Update a smart contract.

member.name: T:RequestType_11
member.summary: Create a "file" stored in the ledger.

member.name: T:RequestType_12
member.summary: Append data to a "file" stored in the ledger.

member.name: T:RequestType_13
member.summary: Update a "file" stored in the ledger.

member.name: T:RequestType_14
member.summary: Delete a "file" stored in the ledger.

member.name: T:RequestType_15
member.summary: Get the balance for an account.

member.name: T:RequestType_16
member.summary: Get a full account record.

member.name: T:RequestType_17
member.summary: Get information about a token.

member.name: T:RequestType_18
member.summary:
Execute a local smart contract call.
Used by contracts to call other contracts.

member.name: T:RequestType_19
member.summary: Get information about a smart contract.

member.name: T:RequestType_20
member.summary: Get the compiled bytecode that implements a smart contract.

member.name: T:RequestType_21
member.summary: Get a smart contract record by reference to the solidity ID.

member.name: T:RequestType_22
member.summary: Get a smart contract by reference to the contract key.

member.name: T:RequestType_23
member.summary: Get the live hash for an account

member.name: T:RequestType_24
member.summary: Get the accounts proxy staking to a given account.

member.name: T:RequestType_25
member.summary: Get the contents of a "file" stored in the ledger.

member.name: T:RequestType_26
member.summary: Get the metadata for a "file" stored in the ledger.

member.name: T:RequestType_27
member.summary: Get transaction record(s) for a specified transaction ID.

member.name: T:RequestType_28
member.summary:
Get all transaction records for a specified contract ID in the past 24 hours.
deprecated since version 0.9.0

member.name: T:RequestType_29
member.summary: Create a new account

member.name: T:RequestType_30
member.summary:
Delete a "system" "file" stored in the ledger.
"System" files are files with special purpose and ID values within a specific range.
These files require additional controls and can only be deleted when authorized by accounts with elevated privilege.

member.name: T:RequestType_31
member.summary:
Undo the delete of a "system" "file" stored in the ledger.
"System" files are files with special purpose and ID values within a specific range.
These files require additional controls and can only be deleted when authorized by accounts with elevated privilege. This operation allows such files to be restored, within a reasonable timeframe, if deleted improperly.

member.name: T:RequestType_32
member.summary: Delete a smart contract

member.name: T:RequestType_33
member.summary:
Stop all processing and "freeze" the entire network.
This is generally sent immediately prior to upgrading the network.
After processing this transactions all nodes enter a quiescent state.

member.name: M:RequestType.services(node)
member.summary:
Create a Transaction Record.
This appears to be purely internal and unused.

member.name: M:RequestType.services(node)_2
member.summary:
Auto-renew an account.
This is used for internal fee calculations.

member.name: M:RequestType.services(node)_3
member.summary:
Auto-renew a smart contract.
This is used for internal fee calculations.

member.name: M:RequestType.Service(HCS)
member.summary:
Get version information for the ledger.
This returns a the version of the software currently running the network for both the protocol buffers and the network services (node).

member.name: M:RequestType.Service(HCS)_2
member.summary: Get a receipt for a specified transaction ID.

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)
member.summary: Create a topic for the Hedera Consensus Service (HCS).

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_2
member.summary: Update an HCS topic.

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_3
member.summary: Delete an HCS topic.

member.name: M:RequestType.Service(HTS)
member.summary: Get metadata (information) for an HCS topic.

member.name: M:RequestType.Service(HTS)_2
member.summary: Publish a message to an HCS topic.

member.name: M:RequestType.Service(HTS)_3
member.summary: Submit a transaction, bypassing intake checking. Only enabled in local-mode.

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_4
member.summary: Create a token for the Hedera Token Service (HTS).

member.name: T:RequestType_34
member.summary: Get metadata (information) for an HTS token.

member.name: T:RequestType_35
member.summary:
Freeze a specific account with respect to a specific HTS token.

Once this transaction completes that account CANNOT send or receive the specified token.

member.name: T:RequestType_36
member.summary: Remove a "freeze" from an account with respect to a specific HTS token.

member.name: T:RequestType_37
member.summary: Grant KYC status to an account for a specific HTS token.

member.name: T:RequestType_38
member.summary: Revoke KYC status from an account for a specific HTS token.

member.name: T:RequestType_39
member.summary: Delete a specific HTS token.

member.name: T:RequestType_40
member.summary: Update a specific HTS token.

member.name: T:RequestType_41
member.summary: Mint HTS token amounts to the treasury account for that token.

member.name: T:RequestType_42
member.summary: Burn HTS token amounts from the treasury account for that token.

member.name: T:RequestType_43
member.summary: Wipe all amounts for a specific HTS token from a specified account.

member.name: T:RequestType_44
member.summary: Associate a specific HTS token to an account.

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_5
member.summary: Dissociate a specific HTS token from an account.

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_6
member.summary: Create a scheduled transaction

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_7
member.summary: Delete a scheduled transaction

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_8
member.summary: Sign a scheduled transaction

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_9
member.summary: Get metadata (information) for a scheduled transaction

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_10
member.summary: Get NFT metadata (information) for a range of NFTs associated to a specific non-fungible/unique HTS token and owned by a specific account.

member.name: M:RequestType.metadata(information)_11
member.summary: Get metadata (information) for a specific NFT identified by token and serial number.

member.name: M:RequestType.time(s)
member.summary: Get NFT metadata (information) for a range of NFTs associated to a specific non-fungible/unique HTS token.

member.name: M:RequestType.time(s)_2
member.summary:
Update a token's custom fee schedule.

If a transaction of this type is not signed by the token `fee_schedule_key` it SHALL fail with INVALID_SIGNATURE, or TOKEN_HAS_NO_FEE_SCHEDULE_KEY if there is no `fee_schedule_key` set.

member.name: T:RequestType_45
member.summary: Get execution time(s) for one or more "recent" TransactionIDs.

member.name: M:RequestType.Delete(unapprove)
member.summary: Pause a specific HTS token

member.name: M:RequestType.Delete(unapprove)_2
member.summary: Unpause a paused HTS token.

member.name: M:RequestType.Delete(unapprove)_3
member.summary: Approve an allowance for a spender relative to the owner account, which MUST sign the transaction.

member.name: M:RequestType.Ethereum(EVM)
member.summary: Delete (unapprove) an allowance previously approved for the owner account.

member.name: M:RequestType.Ethereum(EVM)_2
member.summary:
Get all the information about an account, including balance and allowances.
This does not get a list of account records.

member.name: T:RequestType_46
member.summary:
Perform an Ethereum (EVM) transaction.
CallData may be inline if small, or in a "file" if large.

member.name: T:RequestType_47
member.summary: Used to indicate when the network has updated the staking information at the end of a staking period and to indicate a new staking period has started.

member.name: T:RequestType_48
member.summary: Generate and return a pseudorandom number based on network state.

member.name: T:RequestType_49
member.summary: Get a record for a "recent" transaction.

member.name: T:RequestType_50
member.summary: Update the metadata of one or more NFT's of a specific token type.

member.name: T:RequestType_51
member.summary: Create a node

member.name: T:RequestType_52
member.summary: Update a node

member.name: M:RequestType.sender(s)
member.summary: Delete a node

member.name: M:RequestType.sender(s)_2
member.summary: Transfer one or more token balances held by the requesting account to the treasury for each token type.

member.name: M:RequestType.sender(s)_3
member.summary: Airdrop one or more tokens to one or more accounts.

member.name: T:RequestType_53
member.summary: Remove one or more pending airdrops from state on behalf of the sender(s) for each airdrop.

member.name: T:RequestType_54
member.summary: Claim one or more pending airdrops

member.name: T:RequestType_55
member.summary: Submit a signature of a state root hash gossiped to other nodes

member.name: T:RequestType_56
member.summary: Publish a hinTS key to the network.

member.name: T:RequestType_57
member.summary: Vote for a particular preprocessing output of a hinTS construction.

member.name: T:RequestType_58
member.summary: Sign a partial signature for the active hinTS construction.

member.name: T:RequestType_59
member.summary: Sign a particular history assembly.

member.name: T:RequestType_60
member.summary: Publish a roster history proof key to the network.

member.name: T:RequestType_61
member.summary: Vote for a particular history proof.

member.name: T:RequestType_62
member.summary: Publish a random CRS to the network.

member.name: T:RequestType_63
member.summary: Submit a batch of transactions to run atomically

member.name: T:RequestType_64
member.summary: Update one or more storage slots in an lambda EVM hook.

member.name: T:RequestType_65
member.summary: (Internal-only) Dispatch a hook action.
